title: SAMMY AT THE WELL
subtitle: CAMEO · IV·Emperor · 8:14 PM · Friday dinner from behind the bar
epigraph_upright: Sammy works the bar through Friday dinner. Dante is at the helm. The well runs. The pitcher refills. Nobody asks him for anything he hasn't already prepared for.
epigraph_reversed: Sammy works the bar through Friday dinner. He pours one for himself on the third call instead of the second; Dante notices on the iron stair on his way down. The night holds anyway, but the look between them is a look.
scene_description: Easy cameo. The Hermit's stay-in-place patience inside the Emperor's room. Sammy doesn't leave the bar. The bar is the connection point for the whole floor.
direction_hint: Stay at the well. Refill. Reroute. Let the floor come to you. Three connections.
opening_log_lines: 8:14 PM. The bar. The pitcher full.
Dante's helm light is on overhead. The iron stair is, this Friday, quiet.
Hector at the pass. Nicola at the stand.

scenario_action_cards.title: POUR A SHORT ONE FOR YOURSELF
scenario_action_cards.flavor: The short pour Dante has never, in forty years, asked you not to pour. You drink it standing. The well runs the well runs.

scenario_action_cards.title: ROUTE THE PHONE CALL
scenario_action_cards.flavor: The maître d' stand line rings. You answer behind the bar. You route it where it needs to go without making the caller wait. Whoever it was, you have, for a moment, been the one who heard them.

effects.note: any phone-call visitor active this turn advances 1 step at the bar

scenario_visitors.name: The Well (passive)
scenario_visitors.lore_text: The bar's well. The pitcher, the lemons, the ice scoop. Connecting completes by Sammy doing his job — three turns at the bar without leaving counts as the four-verb sequence.

steps.refill: You top off the pitcher. The pour is the pour the well has always made.
steps.reach: You reach for the lemon halves. The cutting is the cutting your hands learned in '83.
steps.place: You set the pitcher on the bar. Sammy at the well is, for one second, the only thing in the room not moving.
steps.hold: You stand at the well for a beat without doing anything. The well doesn't either. The room around you is the room.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the pitcher has been refilled three times.
you have not, in twelve minutes, left the bar.
you left the well and the well went, in your absence, dry.

doubt_thresholds.label: you poured a second short one for yourself.
dante on the iron stair has, twice, looked your way.
the look between you and dante is a look.

notes: Easy cameo · Sammy at the well. Novel mechanic: the WELL ITSELF is a passive-completion visitor — three turns at the bar = full connection. Stay-in-place verbs honored. New space: BACK BAR PASSTHROUGH connects the bar directly to the pass.
ambient_pool: the well runs the well runs.
the lemons are cut the way the lemons are cut.
the maître d' stand line rings; the bar's extension is, by the third ring, picking up.
